category_sources: Official repository https://github.com/apache/skywalking-eyes describes SkyWalking Eyes as a license tool for headers and dependency licenses.
source_facts.description says license-eye checks and fixes license headers and resolves dependency licenses.
display_name_sources: Official repository https://github.com/apache/skywalking-eyes uses the project name SkyWalking Eyes.
source_facts.name is license-eye, the CLI/formula name.
docs_sources: Official repository README at https://github.com/apache/skywalking-eyes contains usage, configuration, install, and command documentation.
repo_sources: Official repository README includes source-build instructions cloning https://github.com/apache/skywalking-eyes.
source_facts.homepage is https://github.com/apache/skywalking-eyes, the official Apache source repository.
tags_sources: Official repository https://github.com/apache/skywalking-eyes documents license-eye header and dependency commands.
source_facts.description identifies license header checking/fixing and dependency license resolution.
